title: Uruguayan Lentil Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful Uruguayan-inspired lentil pilaf dish, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe combines the nutty flavor of lentils with the aromatic spices of Uruguayan cuisine.

ingredients.name: Lentil
ingredients.notes: red or brown lentils work well

ingredients.name: Springy
ingredients.notes: ground cumin or other Uruguayan spice blend

instructions: Heat the xanthous in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the springy and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the lentil and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the pilaf and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and cover.
Cook for 20-25 minutes, until the lentil is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
